subject: CIR.NO.014-Multilingual Podcasts on three significant themes of the XI World Conference- ?Pathways to World Peace?
body:
[image: logo1.jpg]

*SRI SATHYA SAI VIDYA VIHAR*

          Scheme No. 54, A B Road, INDORE (MP) 452010

                    CBSE School No. : 50056,   CBSE Affiliation No.1030023
                  E-mail: sai@sathyasaiindore.com <sai@sathyasaiindore.com>
     Ph: 0731-2553023
*CIR.NO.SSSVV/2026-27/014
                                Date: 10th April 2026*

Dear Parents



Sai Ram!



In an increasingly complex and fragmented world, peace is not merely an
ideal but a pressing necessity. World peace is truly the need of the hour
and it calls for conscious effort and collective responsibility from each
one of us by fostering understanding, compassion and harmony in daily life.



In this spirit, we are pleased to share the poster with the link for the
Multilingual Podcasts on three significant themes of the XI World
Conference- ?Pathways to World Peace? as a part of the Sri Sathya Sai
Centenary Celebrations as special instruction of AIP, Shri Nimish Pandya
Sir. These thoughtfully curated podcasts offer valuable insights and
guidance to help us reflect on our role in building a peaceful world. Each
podcast beautifully highlights the essence of universal peace, compassion
and the timeless teachings of our Master, Sri Sathya Sai Baba, guiding us
towards a more harmonious way of living.



You are requested to listen to these podcasts in your preferred language,
enabling a deeper understanding and a more personal experience of the Glory
of the Master and His message to practice.



Let us take this opportunity to learn, reflect and act towards building  a
more peaceful and harmonious world.





With Best Regards







Mr. Tribhuvan Sachdeva

Honorary Secretary

Sri Sathya Sai Vidya Vihar, Indore
